scope: D10 IR0/IR1 pull-down placement and identity
promotion_rule: the factory assembly drawing establishes refdes/order and the owner component photograph establishes populated landing centres and readable values; electrical connectivity comes only from the exact .009 sheet-1 drawing

factory_drawing.observation: R105 and R107 are the paired vertical bodies immediately left of D10; R105 is left and R107 is right

owner_board.coordinate_system: original source-image pixels transformed through the registered D10 component affine

targets.observation: left populated red vertical body; 12K marking is directly readable
right populated red vertical body; 12K marking is directly readable
